Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Im currently focused on how to best define the patient cases Im evaluating different strategies for case segmentation exploring the role of various attributes like timestamp and activity in case definition Im leaning toward a time based approach but Im considering other attributes to enrich the segmentation and capture intricate event relationships

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Im now prioritizing the patient age and patient gender attributes Its becoming clear that these act as fundamental case identifiers along with additional info allowing me to distinguish between different patient journeys I am testing the unique combinations to build my understanding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ive determined that patient age and patient gender are effective at creating unique case identifiers Im now examining how the other attributes align within each case Im building a system to validate that events grouped by age and gender maintain logical consistency across activity department and additional info to refine those associations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Im now zeroing in on the attributes provided to perform the grouping The unique combinations of patient age and patient gender appear ideal for creating synthetic Case IDs for each patient Im testing the flow of events within each case confirming it makes logical sense based on activity and additional info

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Im now satisfied with the grouping using patient age and patient gender and my focus is now shifting to validate the events within each case Im building checks to assess the alignment of activity department and additional info to ascertain the logical coherence of each patients journey
